markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Jase Bowen records 3+ hits in the San Diego vs Chicago C professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 30, 2026 at 8:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Jase Bowen is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Jase Bowen starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Jase Bowen is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Jase Bowen is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Jase Bowen: 3+ hits?
